title: In Praise Of Women.
content:
O Jupiter, should I speak ill
    Of woman-kind, first die I will;
    Since that I know, 'mong all the rest
    Of creatures, woman is the best.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "In Praise Of Women.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
